recipient_context.thread_subject: B2B automation evidence workflow - route fit question
recipient_context.incoming_request_summary: OpenOcean asked Gary to submit a pitch deck on their website with a few key data points before they can respond promptly.

validation_rules: No attachment is included in the email reply.
No private finance, bank, tax, payroll, password, token, raw ledger or grant portal credential data is included.
No customer traction, partner commitment, validated technical performance, regulatory approval or funding guarantee is claimed.
The reply acknowledges OpenOcean's request for deck and key data points.
The reply references the official OpenOcean pitch route observed on the current contact page: info@openocean.vc.
The commercial framing is tailored to OpenOcean's AI/data infrastructure and automation software focus.
controls: Reply only; no deck, file upload, contact form submission, portal mutation or attachment is performed by this staging run.
Submission-route follow-up is staged separately because OpenOcean requested deck and key data points.
The body avoids private finance, raw ledgers, passwords, tokens, tax, payroll and unsupported traction claims.
